result.description: Jordan Walker homers (21) on a fly ball to left field. JJ Wetherholt scores.
Joey Ortiz doubles (6) on a line drive to left fielder Lars Nootbaar. Cooper Pratt scores.
Christian Yelich hits a ground-rule double (11) on a line drive down the right-field line.
Jackson Chourio flies out to center fielder Nathan Church. Christian Yelich to 3rd.
Brice Turang strikes out on a foul tip.
Nathan Church grounds out to first baseman Andrew Vaughn.
